name: HBOT — single session
description: One 60-minute hyperbaric oxygen session. The best way to try it for the first time.

name: HBOT — 5 sessions
description: Five HBOT sessions at a reduced per-session rate. Valid for 90 days from purchase.

name: HBOT — 10 sessions
description: Ten HBOT sessions for users building HBOT into a regular weekly routine. Valid for 120 days.

name: Red Light — single session
description: One 15-minute full-body red light panel session. Pairs well with HBOT or PEMF on the same visit.

name: Red Light — 10 sessions
description: Ten red light sessions at a reduced rate. Valid for 120 days.

name: PEMF — single session
description: One 30-minute PEMF mat session. The calmest thirty minutes of your week.

name: Recovery Stack
description: One of each: HBOT, Red Light and PEMF — booked as a single visit. The best introduction to the full studio.

name: Dlús Monthly
description: Unlimited Red Light and PEMF, plus four HBOT sessions every month. No fixed term — cancel any time.
